message: Node started: Formulate a greedy strategy to minimize the total bits added. Given the Trie structure, if a node is marked as an end-of-string, any path passing through it must be extended. If multiple strings share a prefix, calculate the minimum extensions required to make them unique and prefix-free. This is related to the concept of a prefix-free code where we want to minimize the sum of (length_after - length_before).
